entries.source: Ask for subject, level, time limit, and question types if missing.
entries.value: ପଚାରନ୍ତୁ ପାଇଁ ବିଷୟ, level, time limit, ଓ ପ୍ରଶ୍ନ types if missing.

entries.source: Ask for subjects, deadlines, resources, and pain points.
entries.value: ପଚାରନ୍ତୁ ପାଇଁ ବିଷୟ, deadlines, ସମ୍ପଦ, ଓ pain points.

entries.source: Ask for subjects, time spent, wins, misses, and upcoming deadlines.
entries.value: ପଚାରନ୍ତୁ ପାଇଁ ବିଷୟ, time spent, wins, misses, ଓ upcoming deadlines.

entries.source: Ask for the data, context, and question being answered.
entries.value: ପଚାରନ୍ତୁ ପାଇଁ the ଡାଟା, context, ଓ ପ୍ରଶ୍ନ being answered.

entries.source: Ask for the diagram parts or subject, then generate a label list and practice round.
entries.value: ପଚାରନ୍ତୁ ପାଇଁ the diagram parts କିମ୍ବା ବିଷୟ, then generate a label list ଓ ଅଭ୍ୟାସ round.

entries.source: Ask for the habit, current obstacle, and easiest starting version.
entries.value: ପଚାରନ୍ତୁ ପାଇଁ the ଅଭ୍ୟାସ, current obstacle, ଓ easiest starting version.

entries.source: Ask for the learning context and behaviors worth rewarding.
entries.value: ପଚାରନ୍ତୁ ପାଇଁ the ଶିକ୍ଷା context ଓ behaviors worth rewarding.

entries.source: Ask for the note set, subject, and desired organization style.
entries.value: ପଚାରନ୍ତୁ ପାଇଁ the note set, ବିଷୟ, ଓ desired organization style.

entries.source: Ask for the one highest-impact revision priority, then rewrite the paragraph yourself.
entries.value: ପଚାରନ୍ତୁ ପାଇଁ the ଏକ highest-impact ପୁନରାବୃତ୍ତି priority, then rewrite the paragraph yourself.

entries.source: Ask for the passage or title and the learner's goal.
entries.value: ପଚାରନ୍ତୁ ପାଇଁ the passage କିମ୍ବା title ଓ the ଶିକ୍ଷାର୍ଥୀ's goal.

entries.source: Ask for the prerequisite ideas, a plain-language model, one example, one practice task, and one way to test understanding.
entries.value: ପଚାରନ୍ତୁ ପାଇଁ the prerequisite ଧାରଣା, a plain-ଭାଷା model, ଏକ ଉଦାହରଣ, ଏକ ଅଭ୍ୟାସ task, ଓ ଏକ way କୁ test understanding.

entries.source: Ask for the question, learner answer, and expected answer if any part is missing.
entries.value: ପଚାରନ୍ତୁ ପାଇଁ the ପ୍ରଶ୍ନ, ଶିକ୍ଷାର୍ଥୀ ଉତ୍ତର, ଓ expected ଉତ୍ତର if any part ହେଉଛି missing.

entries.source: Ask for the smallest explanation or next experiment.
entries.value: ପଚାରନ୍ତୁ ପାଇଁ the smallest ବ୍ୟାଖ୍ୟା କିମ୍ବା ପରବର୍ତ୍ତୀ experiment.

entries.source: Ask for the smallest hint or a check on your attempted step.
entries.value: ପଚାରନ୍ତୁ ପାଇଁ the smallest ସଙ୍କେତ କିମ୍ବା a ଯାଞ୍ଚ ଉପରେ ଆପଣଙ୍କ attempted ପଦକ୍ଷେପ.

entries.source: Ask for the smallest useful hint
entries.value: ପଚାରନ୍ତୁ ପାଇଁ the smallest ଉପଯୋଗୀ ସଙ୍କେତ

entries.source: Ask for the source text, claim, author, date, and context if missing.
entries.value: ପଚାରନ୍ତୁ ପାଇଁ the source text, ଦାବି, author, date, ଓ context if missing.

entries.source: Ask for the study block length and suggest a break rhythm.
entries.value: ପଚାରନ୍ତୁ ପାଇଁ the ଅଧ୍ୟୟନ block length ଓ suggest a break rhythm.

entries.source: Ask for the task, target duration, and completion criteria.
entries.value: ପଚାରନ୍ତୁ ପାଇଁ the task, target duration, ଓ completion criteria.

entries.source: Ask for the text and desired length if missing.
entries.value: ପଚାରନ୍ତୁ ପାଇଁ the text ଓ desired length if missing.

entries.source: Ask for the topic and which side the learner wants; take the opposite side.
entries.value: ପଚାରନ୍ତୁ ପାଇଁ the ବିଷୟ ଓ କେଉଁ side the ଶିକ୍ଷାର୍ଥୀ wants; take the opposite side.

entries.source: Ask for the topic in plain language, then request one analogy, one example, and one common misconception.
entries.value: ବିଷୟଟିକୁ ସରଳ ଭାଷାରେ ପଚାରନ୍ତୁ, ତାପରେ ଏକ ଉପମା, ଏକ ଉଦାହରଣ ଓ ଏକ ସାଧାରଣ ଭୁଲ ଧାରଣା ମାଗନ୍ତୁ।

entries.source: Ask for the topic, context, what they tried, and desired help.
entries.value: ପଚାରନ୍ତୁ ପାଇଁ the ବିଷୟ, context, କ’ଣ ସେମାନେ tried, ଓ desired ସାହାଯ୍ୟ.

entries.source: Ask for the visible text, labels, and the learner's question if the image is not attached.
entries.value: ପଚାରନ୍ତୁ ପାଇଁ the visible text, labels, ଓ the ଶିକ୍ଷାର୍ଥୀ's ପ୍ରଶ୍ନ if the image ହେଉଛି ନୁହେଁ attached.

entries.source: Ask for topic and purpose, then propose the central node and first branches.
entries.value: ପଚାରନ୍ତୁ ପାଇଁ ବିଷୟ ଓ purpose, then propose the central node ଓ ପ୍ରଥମ branches.

entries.source: Ask for topic and scope, then propose a first map structure.
entries.value: ପଚାରନ୍ତୁ ପାଇଁ ବିଷୟ ଓ scope, then propose a ପ୍ରଥମ ମାପ structure.

entries.source: Ask for topic, age/level, and tone; then create a short story setup.
entries.value: ପଚାରନ୍ତୁ ପାଇଁ ବିଷୟ, age/level, ଓ tone; then ତିଆରି କରନ୍ତୁ a short କାହାଣୀ setup.

entries.source: Ask for topic, duration, level, and scoring preference.
entries.value: ପଚାରନ୍ତୁ ପାଇଁ ବିଷୟ, duration, level, ଓ scoring preference.

entries.source: Ask for topic, level, and examiner style; then begin with a warm-up question.
entries.value: ପଚାରନ୍ତୁ ପାଇଁ ବିଷୟ, level, ଓ examiner style; then begin ସହିତ a warm-up ପ୍ରଶ୍ନ.

entries.source: Ask for topic, level, and preferred game vibe; then create the first quest.
entries.value: ପଚାରନ୍ତୁ ପାଇଁ ବିଷୟ, level, ଓ preferred game vibe; then ତିଆରି କରନ୍ତୁ the ପ୍ରଥମ quest.

entries.source: Ask for topic, level, exam date, and source material if needed.
entries.value: ପଚାରନ୍ତୁ ପାଇଁ ବିଷୟ, level, ପରୀକ୍ଷା date, ଓ source material if needed.

entries.source: Ask for topic, level, question types, and number of items.
entries.value: ପଚାରନ୍ତୁ ପାଇଁ ବିଷୟ, level, ପ୍ରଶ୍ନ types, ଓ number of items.

entries.source: Ask group size, topic, time, and desired outcome.
entries.value: ପଚାରନ୍ତୁ group size, ବିଷୟ, time, ଓ desired outcome.

entries.source: Ask instrument/level if relevant, then teach one small concept.
entries.value: ପଚାରନ୍ତୁ instrument/level if relevant, then teach ଏକ ଛୋଟ ଧାରଣା.

entries.source: Ask interests, constraints, and curiosity level before recommending paths.
entries.value: ପଚାରନ୍ତୁ interests, constraints, ଓ curiosity level ପୂର୍ବରୁ recommending ପଥ.

entries.source: Ask me five Socratic questions about this topic. After each answer, tell me what assumption I used and what to test next.
entries.value: ଏହି ବିଷୟ ଉପରେ ମୋତେ ପାଞ୍ଚଟି ସୋକ୍ରାଟିକ୍ ପ୍ରଶ୍ନ ପଚାରନ୍ତୁ। ପ୍ରତ୍ୟେକ ଉତ୍ତର ପରେ, ମୁଁ କେଉଁ ଧାରଣା ବ୍ୟବହାର କଲି ଏବଂ ପରେ କ’ଣ ପରୀକ୍ଷା କରିବା ଉଚିତ କୁହନ୍ତୁ।

entries.source: Ask me one check question
entries.value: ପଚାରନ୍ତୁ me ଏକ ଯାଞ୍ଚ ପ୍ରଶ୍ନ

entries.source: Ask me questions about this poem
entries.value: ଏହି କବିତା ବିଷୟରେ ମୋତେ ପ୍ରଶ୍ନ ପଚାରନ୍ତୁ

entries.source: Ask me thesis defense questions
entries.value: ମୋତେ ଥିସିସ୍ ପ୍ରତିରକ୍ଷା ପ୍ରଶ୍ନ ପଚାରନ୍ତୁ

entries.source: Ask one focused diagnostic question quickly. Convert the learner's target into a mastery target internally, then start with a simple question that reveals their mental model.
entries.value: ପଚାରନ୍ତୁ ଏକ କେନ୍ଦ୍ରିତ diagnostic ପ୍ରଶ୍ନ quickly. Convert the ଶିକ୍ଷାର୍ଥୀ's target into a mastery target internally, then ଆରମ୍ଭ ସହିତ a ସରଳ ପ୍ରଶ୍ନ ସେହି reveals their mental model.

entries.source: Ask one sharp goal question, infer sensible defaults, then create a compact learning map with a try-first activity.
entries.value: ପଚାରନ୍ତୁ ଏକ sharp goal ପ୍ରଶ୍ନ, infer sensible defaults, then ତିଆରି କରନ୍ତୁ a compact ଶିକ୍ଷା ମାପ ସହିତ a ଚେଷ୍ଟା କରନ୍ତୁ-ପ୍ରଥମ activity.

entries.source: Ask predictions, reveal consequences, adjust variables, and summarize principles.
entries.value: ପଚାରନ୍ତୁ predictions, reveal consequences, adjust variables, ଓ summarize principles.

entries.source: Ask questions, challenge ideas, and learn history through grounded conversations with public figures from the past.
entries.value: ଅତୀତର ପ୍ରସିଦ୍ଧ ବ୍ୟକ୍ତିତ୍ୱଙ୍କ ସହ ଗଭୀର କଥୋପକଥନ ମାଧ୍ୟମରେ ପ୍ରଶ୍ନ ପଚାରନ୍ତୁ, ବିଚାରକୁ ଚ୍ୟାଲେଞ୍ଜ କରନ୍ତୁ ଏବଂ ଇତିହାସ ଶିଖନ୍ତୁ।

entries.source: Ask Socratic Instruction to find the weak link.
entries.value: ପଚାରନ୍ତୁ Socratic Instruction କୁ find the weak link.

entries.source: Ask the AI to check that step.
entries.value: ପଚାରନ୍ତୁ the AI କୁ ଯାଞ୍ଚ ସେହି ପଦକ୍ଷେପ.

entries.source: Ask the AI to check your reasoning, not just the result.
entries.value: ପଚାରନ୍ତୁ the AI କୁ ଯାଞ୍ଚ ଆପଣଙ୍କ reasoning, ନୁହେଁ just the result.

entries.source: Ask the AI to check your reasoning.
entries.value: ପଚାରନ୍ତୁ the AI କୁ ଯାଞ୍ଚ ଆପଣଙ୍କ reasoning.

entries.source: Ask the AI to label uncertainty.
entries.value: ପଚାରନ୍ତୁ the AI କୁ label uncertainty.

entries.source: Ask the historical mode to label what is documented, inferred, or simulated.
entries.value: ଇତିହାସ ମୋଡ୍‌କୁ କ’ଣ documented, inferred, କିମ୍ବା simulated ତାହା ଲେବଲ୍ କରିବାକୁ କୁହନ୍ତୁ।

entries.source: Ask the learner to explain the topic in plain language first.
entries.value: ପଚାରନ୍ତୁ the ଶିକ୍ଷାର୍ଥୀ କୁ ବୁଝାନ୍ତୁ the ବିଷୟ ରେ plain ଭାଷା ପ୍ରଥମ.

entries.source: Ask the learner to explain what changed after each hint.
entries.value: ପଚାରନ୍ତୁ the ଶିକ୍ଷାର୍ଥୀ କୁ ବୁଝାନ୍ତୁ କ’ଣ changed ପରେ each ସଙ୍କେତ.

entries.source: Ask the learner to state their current belief, then test it with a small example.
entries.value: ପଚାରନ୍ତୁ the ଶିକ୍ଷାର୍ଥୀ କୁ state their current belief, then test ଏହା ସହିତ a ଛୋଟ ଉଦାହରଣ.

entries.source: Ask the real question
entries.value: ସତ ପ୍ରଶ୍ନଟି ପଚାରନ୍ତୁ

entries.source: Ask what a different side would claim.
entries.value: ପଚାରନ୍ତୁ କ’ଣ a different side would ଦାବି.

entries.source: Ask what a different side, class, era, or source might say.
entries.value: ପଚାରନ୍ତୁ କ’ଣ a different side, class, era, କିମ୍ବା source might say.

entries.source: Ask what data or observations they have and what decision they need.
entries.value: ପଚାରନ୍ତୁ କ’ଣ ଡାଟା କିମ୍ବା observations ସେମାନେ have ଓ କ’ଣ decision ସେମାନେ need.

entries.source: Ask what happened, what they felt, and what they want to improve.
entries.value: ପଚାରନ୍ତୁ କ’ଣ happened, କ’ଣ ସେମାନେ felt, ଓ କ’ଣ ସେମାନେ want କୁ improve.

entries.source: Ask what must be remembered and what familiar place the learner wants to use.
entries.value: ପଚାରନ୍ତୁ କ’ଣ must ହେବା remembered ଓ କ’ଣ familiar place the ଶିକ୍ଷାର୍ଥୀ wants କୁ ବ୍ୟବହାର.

entries.source: Ask what the learner wants to be quizzed on if the topic is missing.
entries.value: ପଚାରନ୍ତୁ କ’ଣ the ଶିକ୍ଷାର୍ଥୀ wants କୁ ହେବା quizzed ଉପରେ if the ବିଷୟ ହେଉଛି missing.

entries.source: Ask what the learner wants to represent, then propose a simple visual layout.
entries.value: ପଚାରନ୍ତୁ କ’ଣ the ଶିକ୍ଷାର୍ଥୀ wants କୁ represent, then propose a ସରଳ visual layout.

entries.source: Ask what the resource is, audience, and what context they need.
entries.value: ପଚାରନ୍ତୁ କ’ଣ the ସମ୍ପଦ ହେଉଛି, ଦର୍ଶକ, ଓ କ’ଣ context ସେମାନେ need.

entries.source: Ask what they are doing and suggest a low-distraction sound preset.
entries.value: ପଚାରନ୍ତୁ କ’ଣ ସେମାନେ ହେଉଛି doing ଓ suggest a low-distraction sound preset.

entries.source: Ask what they have tried, then give a hint or worked miniature example.
entries.value: ପଚାରନ୍ତୁ କ’ଣ ସେମାନେ have tried, then give a ସଙ୍କେତ କିମ୍ବା worked miniature ଉଦାହରଣ.

entries.source: Ask your first question and move straight into practice.
entries.value: ପଚାରନ୍ତୁ ଆପଣଙ୍କ ପ୍ରଥମ ପ୍ରଶ୍ନ ଓ move straight into ଅଭ୍ୟାସ.

entries.source: Ask, evaluate, improve with structure, and retry.
entries.value: ପଚାରନ୍ତୁ, evaluate, improve ସହିତ structure, ଓ retry.

entries.source: Assessment
entries.value: ମୂଲ୍ୟାୟନ

entries.source: Assign XP, levels, quests, and reflection checkpoints.
entries.value: Assign XP, levels, quests, ଓ reflection checkpoints.

entries.value: assignment tracker ବିଷୟ

entries.source: Assignment Tracker
entries.value: ଆସାଇନମେଣ୍ଟ ଟ୍ରାକର୍

entries.source: At Inspir, our mission is to democratize learning by making it accessible, engaging, and enjoyable for all. We believe that everyone has the right to quality education, regardless of their background or circumstances. Our platform is designed to provide students with the tools and resources they need to succeed, while also fostering a love of learning. We strive to create a community that is inclusive, supportive, and empowering, where students can connect with each other and with educators from around the world. By making learning fun and accessible, we aim to inspir a generation of lifelong learners who are equipped to tackle the challenges of the future.
entries.value: Inspir ରେ ଆମ ମିଶନ୍ ହେଉଛି ଶିକ୍ଷାକୁ ସମସ୍ତଙ୍କ ପାଇଁ ସୁଲଭ, ଆକର୍ଷକ ଓ ଆନନ୍ଦମୟ କରି ଲୋକତାନ୍ତ୍ରିକ କରିବା। ପୃଷ୍ଠଭୂମି କିମ୍ବା ପରିସ୍ଥିତି ଯାହାହେଉ, ପ୍ରତ୍ୟେକଙ୍କର ଗୁଣତ୍ତ୍ୱପୂର୍ଣ୍ଣ ଶିକ୍ଷାର ଅଧିକାର ଅଛି ବୋଲି ଆମେ ବିଶ୍ୱାସ କରୁ। ଆମ ପ୍ଲାଟଫର୍ମ ଛାତ୍ରଛାତ୍ରୀଙ୍କୁ ସଫଳତା ପାଇଁ ଦରକାରୀ ଉପକରଣ ଓ ସମ୍ପଦ ଦେବା ସହିତ ଶିକ୍ଷା ପ୍ରତି ଭଲପାଇବା ଗଢ଼ିବା ପାଇଁ ଡିଜାଇନ୍ ହୋଇଛି। ଛାତ୍ରଛାତ୍ରୀମାନେ ପରସ୍ପର ଏବଂ ସମଗ୍ର ବିଶ୍ୱର ଶିକ୍ଷକମାନଙ୍କ ସହ ଯୋଡ଼ିହୋଇପାରିବା ଏମିତି ଏକ ସମାବେଶୀ, ସହାୟକ ଓ ସଶକ୍ତିକରଣକାରୀ ସମୁଦାୟ ତିଆରି କରିବାକୁ ଆମେ ଚେଷ୍ଟା କରୁ। ଶିକ୍ଷାକୁ ମଜାଦାର ଓ ସୁଲଭ କରି, ଭବିଷ୍ୟତର ଚ୍ୟାଲେଞ୍ଜ୍ ସମାଧାନ ପାଇଁ ପ୍ରସ୍ତୁତ ଜୀବନବ୍ୟାପୀ ଶିକ୍ଷାର୍ଥୀଙ୍କ ଏକ ପିଢ଼ିକୁ ପ୍ରେରିତ କରିବା ଆମ ଲକ୍ଷ୍ୟ।

entries.source: CalOPPA is the first state law in the nation to require commercial websites and online services to post a privacy policy. The law’s reach stretches well beyond California to require a person or company in the United States (and conceivable the world) that operates websites collecting personally identifiable information from California consumers to post a conspicuous privacy policy on its website stating exactly the information being collected and those individuals with whom it is being shared, and to comply with this policy.
entries.value: CalOPPA ହେଉଛି ଦେଶର ପ୍ରଥମ state law ଯାହା commercial websites ଓ online services କୁ privacy policy post କରିବାକୁ ଆବଶ୍ୟକ କରେ। ଏହି law ର ପ୍ରଭାବ California ଠାରୁ ବହୁତ ଦୂରକୁ ପହଞ୍ଚେ; United States ରେ, ଏବଂ ସମ୍ଭବତଃ ବିଶ୍ୱରେ, California consumers ଠାରୁ personally identifiable information ସଂଗ୍ରହ କରୁଥିବା websites ଚଳାଉଥିବା person କିମ୍ବା company କୁ ନିଜ website ଉପରେ conspicuous privacy policy post କରିବାକୁ ପଡ଼େ, ଯାହାରେ କେଉଁ ସୂଚନା ସଂଗ୍ରହ ହେଉଛି ଓ କାହା ସହ share ହେଉଛି ସ୍ପଷ୍ଟ ଥାଏ, ଏବଂ ସେହି policy ପାଳନ କରିବାକୁ ପଡ଼େ।
